question: What ANOVA F-statistic and effect size were reported for the association between lower heat-related knowledge and training and higher perceived occupational heat stress scores in this German tertiary care hospital study?

What proportion of the 792 eligible children aged 6 months to 6 years adhered to influenza vaccination following the combined digital and active reminder intervention in this Italian primary care practice study?

What specific categories of digital technologies — ranging from mobile apps to wearable devices — were synthesized as supporting the physical health of higher education students in this systematic scoping review?

What two scales were used to measure health literacy and digital healthy diet literacy among 1,047 adults recruited from three socioeconomically distinct districts in Istanbul in this community-based cross-sectional study?

What total weighted sample size of men aged 15 to 59 across 28 Sub-Saharan African countries was included in this multilevel mixed-effect logistic regression analysis of tobacco use determinants using DHS data from 2016 to 2024?
What was the mean Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Index score and the prevalence rate of sleep disorders found among residents of the Chengguan District in Lhasa in this high-altitude cross-sectional study?

Which two specific statutory health insurance funds in Germany were represented by the 20 participants interviewed about motivating and obstructive factors for participation in digital prevention courses in this qualitative study?
What qualitative method and how many interviews were used to explore household food decision-making among food preparers in two urban slums in Ibadan, Nigeria?

What was the duration of the MOVESCHOOL intervention, and how many school leaders, teachers, and students participated in the qualitative component examining perceptions of physically active learning in secondary schools?

What composite neighborhood-level index was evaluated for its association with COVID-19 hospitalization risk at the patient level using electronic health record data in this California retrospective cohort study?
Across how many cycles of the Norwegian HBSC survey spanning 2001/02 to 2017/18 were temporal trends and age- and sex-specific socioeconomic inequalities in adolescent life satisfaction analyzed?
What sample size and two-step clustering method were used to identify dietary patterns among Serbian adults in the secondary analysis of the 2019 Serbian Health Interview Survey?

Which three national Indian data sources were combined to construct the composite Syndemic Index for assessing geographic co-occurrence of poverty, undernutrition, and infectious diseases across Indian states?

What sample size and specific dietary data collection method were used in this southern Brazilian mixed-methods study examining the influence of food-related digital media content on eating behavior among overweight and obese adolescents aged 10 to 17?
What two work-related questionnaires were administered to 681 participants with paid work at the 12-month follow-up assessment in the ParaCov allied health COVID-19 recovery cohort study?

What was the average age of the 345 participants in this Turkish cross-sectional study examining the effect of job satisfaction on work-life balance using the Work-Life Balance Scale and Job Satisfaction Survey?

How many databases were systematically searched to identify peer-reviewed protocols of interrupted time series studies of health interventions in this methodological investigation of selective reporting bias?

In which two Ugandan districts were the three HIV clinics selected for this cross-sectional study on community blood pressure monitoring uptake among people living with HIV and hypertension, and during what months was data collected?

What analytical method was used to examine the congruence and incongruence effects of psychological resilience and perceived social support on anxiety, depression, and perceived stress outcomes among casino employees in Macau?

How many communities and locally acquired dengue cases were analyzed, and what two vegetation measurement approaches were combined with origin-destination mobility networks to model neighborhood-level dengue risk in Guangzhou from 2015 to 2019?

Using the KAP framework, what student populations were surveyed at the University of Florida between August and November 2025 regarding awareness, perceptions, and self-reported behaviors related to microplastics and health?

In which country and demographic surveillance system is the Physio-HeMAB cluster randomized trial being conducted to assess the effects of environmental heat exposure on maternal and fetal physiological responses during pregnancy?

What was the influenza vaccination coverage rate among the 302,815 adults aged 65 and older during the 2022-2023 influenza season in this large Health Maintenance Organization retrospective cross-sectional study?
What study design and two specific national Taiwanese data sources were linked to examine the association between time since last screening mammogram and advanced versus early-stage breast cancer?

Which two specific diagnostic tests were used across eight prisons in six Brazilian cities in 2025 to evaluate tuberculosis burden and identify factors associated with test positivity among people deprived of liberty?

What mixed methods design and specific qualitative data collection method were combined in this Chilean study examining how intrahousehold dynamics influenced food access and dietary quality among low- to middle-income children during the COVID-19 lockdown?

How many semi-structured interviews and field observations were conducted between 2021 and 2023 across Denver and San Francisco to examine municipal stakeholder perceptions of community safety response protocols for substance use-related emergencies?

How many nationally representative surveys across what time span were analyzed to produce the twenty-year overview of substance use and behavioral addiction trends among Moroccan school-going adolescents?

What ICD-10 code range was used to identify liver disease decedents in this CDC WONDER retrospective analysis of alcohol- and drug-induced mortality trends stratified by sex and race, with projections through 2043?

What educational approach and target population were central to this Brazilian study analyzing participatory methodologies in food and nutrition education, and what limitations in child interview data were identified?
